headline: BMO Capital Sees AMETEK (AME) Rebounding After Lagging 2025 Performance
summary: AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE:AME) is included among the 13 Best Diversified Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 27, BMO Capital analyst Daniel DiCicco initiated coverage of AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE:AME) with an Outperform rating. The firm set a $253 price target on the stock. The analyst said the stock lagged the broader industrial group in […]
